basicDetails.schemeName: Awareness Programme on Child/Human Trafficking, Family Planning, Legal Awareness, Health etc.

nodalDepartmentName.label: Tea Tribes and Adivasi Welfare Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Awareness Programme on Child/Human Trafficking, Family Planning, Legal Awareness, Health etc." was launched by the Tea Tribes and Adivasi Welfare Department, Government of Assam. The scheme aims to generate awareness among the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community on critical social issues. The scheme provides a platform to generate awareness regarding child/human trafficking, family planning, legal awareness, and health issues such as the reduction of Maternal Mortality Rate, Infant Mortality Rate, and Alcoholism, along with maintaining hygiene. The applications for this scheme are accepted by inviting proposals through Expression of Interest (EOI).
schemeContent.benefits_md: - The benefit is to generate awareness among the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community on issues like child/human trafficking, family planning, legal awareness, and health (reduction of Maternal Mortality Rate, Infant Mortality Rate, Alcoholism, and maintenance of hygiene). - This awareness generation aims towards bringing effective social and behavioural change amongst the community.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to generate awareness among the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community regarding child/human trafficking, family planning, legal awareness, and health. It generates awareness benefits for the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community through Non-Governmental Organizations proposals.

children.text: The scheme "Awareness Programme on Child/Human Trafficking, Family Planning, Legal Awareness, Health etc." was launched by the Tea Tribes and Adivasi Welfare Department, Government of Assam. The scheme aims to generate awareness among the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community on critical social issues. The scheme provides a platform to generate awareness regarding child/human trafficking, family planning, legal awareness, and health issues such as the reduction of Maternal Mortality Rate, Infant Mortality Rate, and Alcoholism, along with maintaining hygiene. The applications for this scheme are accepted by inviting proposals through Expression of Interest (EOI).

The benefit is to generate awareness among the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community on issues like child/human trafficking, family planning, legal awareness, and health (reduction of Maternal Mortality Rate, Infant Mortality Rate, Alcoholism, and maintenance of hygiene).
This awareness generation aims towards bringing effective social and behavioural change amongst the community.
The implementation of the scheme is initiated by issuing proposals inviting Non-Governmental Organizations (NGOs).
Eligible NGOs must submit their proposals for the implementation of the scheme by responding to the Expression of Interest (EOI).
The details of the scheme guidelines will be available at the official website (

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The implementation of the scheme is initiated by issuing proposals inviting Non-Governmental Organizations (NGOs). **Step 2:** Eligible NGOs must submit their proposals for the implementation of the scheme by responding to the Expression of Interest (EOI). **Where to Apply** The details of the scheme guidelines will be available at the official website ([**http://ttwd.assam.gov.in**](http://ttwd.assam.gov.in)).

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant must be a Non-Governmental Organization. - The applicant must have valid registration under Societies Act, XXI of 1860.

children.text: The applicant must be a Non-Governmental Organization.
The applicant must have valid registration under Societies Act, XXI of 1860.
